doctor.name: DR Nguyen Tien Dat
doctor.summary: A plastic and aesthetic surgeon specializing in body-contouring procedures, with key service groups including breast augmentation, body-contouring liposuction, abdominoplasty, and personalized body-proportion design for each client.
credentials: 5 years serving as Deputy Head of Aesthetic Surgery at Thu Cuc Aesthetic Hospital
Completed the French–Vietnamese aesthetic surgery training program
Lecturer in Plastic Surgery at Hanoi Medical Institute
Former professional instructor for medical-university training programs
In-house doctor at Ha Thanh General Hospital
Guest speaker on Vietnam national television programs

services.title: Breast Augmentation
services.subtitle: Standard breast augmentation, breast lift, and personalized breast-shape planning
services.description: Focused on body proportions, breast harmony, and shape planning tailored to each client’s height, shoulders, waist, and skeletal frame.
steps: Breast-base and glandular tissue examination
Shape, size, and personalized direction consultation
Surgical plan selection based on individual anatomy
Postoperative monitoring and follow-up visits

services.title: Body-Contouring Liposuction
services.subtitle: Applied to the abdomen, back, arms, legs, and areas that need refinement
services.description: Designed to create balanced body contours, reduce measurements, and improve the overall silhouette harmoniously.
steps: Assess fat distribution and skin quality
Map body contours according to individual proportions
Perform the procedure according to professional indications
Monitor surface smoothness and shaping after intervention

services.title: Abdominoplasty
services.subtitle: Liposuction, mini skin removal, tummy tuck, and navel repositioning
services.description: Suitable for clients with excess skin, abdominal-wall laxity, or a desire to reshape the abdomen after childbirth or weight loss.
steps: Assess excess skin, fat tissue, and abdominal-wall condition
Select the appropriate technique based on the actual condition
Perform the body-shaping plan discussed during consultation
Postoperative care and follow-up visits

services.title: Body-Sculpting Combo
services.subtitle: Breast–abdomen, abdomen–back, and full-body form refinement combinations
services.description: Combines multiple areas within one aesthetic direction to optimize continuity and body balance.
steps: Analyze the overall body shape
Design a synchronized treatment roadmap
Prioritize safety and effectiveness during execution
Monitor recovery through each milestone

services.title: Facial Services
services.subtitle: Nose, eyelids, and refined facial-line adjustments
services.description: Prioritizes harmonious proportions, natural expression, and enhancement of each client’s unique features.
steps: Analyze facial structure
Consult on the most suitable approach
Perform the procedure according to professional indications
Monitor stability and final result refinement

technology.name: Vectra XT
technology.title: Vectra XT
technology.description: A 3D simulation system that helps the doctor and client visualize post-procedure shape more clearly before treatment.
details: Suitable for cases that require clear shape planning

technology.name: Q-Lean Lipo
technology.title: Q-Lean Lipo
technology.description: A device supporting body-contouring liposuction, optimizing handling experience and the postoperative surface.
details: Can be combined in liposuction and body-contouring cases

technology.name: Cold Plasma
technology.title: Cold Plasma
technology.description: A device applied after surgery when indicated, supporting care of the treated area during the early recovery phase.
details: Supports monitoring of treated areas during the early phase

technology.name: Longest
technology.title: Longest
technology.description: A device supporting postoperative care and recovery according to the post-intervention care pathway.

facility.title: Ha Thanh General Hospital
facility.address: 61 Vu Thanh, O Cho Dua, Dong Da, Hanoi
facility.description: A modern medical facility space supporting consultation, procedure delivery, and postoperative care with an experience-first approach for clients.
items: Convenient for postoperative monitoring and follow-up visits
